body.purpose: All body text, paragraphs, descriptions, form values.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, nav items.

data.purpose: Eyebrow labels, tags, filter chips, stat numbers.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Card and button hover state lift.

shadows.name: hover-lift-dark
shadows.purpose: Card hover lift in dark mode.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Used for upload, save, create portfolio.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 18px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: #09090b; color: #fff; font-family: Mali, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(9,9,11,0.05); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #27272a; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(9,9,11,0.08); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c3aed; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Used for cancel, back, browse.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 18px; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); color: #18181b; font-family: Mali, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f4f4f5; border-color: #d4d4d8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c3aed; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Text Input
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="ชื่อประกาศนียบัตร">
components.css: .ds-input { padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #18181b; font-family: Mali, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #7c3aed; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f5f3ff; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a1a1aa; }

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: Primary container for content panels, detail sections, sidebar panels.
components.html:
คลังอัจฉริยะ
ประกาศนียบัตรตามปีการศึกษา

อัปโหลดรูปภาพหรือเอกสาร ติดป้ายปีการศึกษาไทย
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 14px; background: #ffffff; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(9,9,11,0.12); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #71717a; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-card-heading { font-family: Mali, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.15; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Mali, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.65; color: #71717a; margin: 8px 0 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Primary navigation. Sticky sidebar with icon+label items.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: grid; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 11px 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-family: Mali, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #fff; } .ds-nav-item svg { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Toggleable filter in certificate archive sidebar and panel actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-chip">ปีการศึกษา</button><button class="ds-chip ds-chip-active">วิชาการ</button>
components.css: .ds-chip { padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 999px; background: #ffffff; color: #71717a; font-family: SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #7c3aed; color: #7c3aed; } .ds-chip-active { background: #09090b; color: #fff; border-color: #09090b; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard metric card showing a number with label and trend.
components.html:
ประกาศนียบัตร

42+3 เดือนนี้
components.css: .ds-stat { padding: 22px; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 14px; background: #ffffff; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-stat:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(9,9,11,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-stat-label { margin: 0; font-family: SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #71717a; } .ds-stat-value { display: block; margin: 14px 0 6px; font-family: SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace; font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 42px); letter-spacing: -0.05em; color: #18181b; } .ds-stat-trend { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; color: #71717a; }

narrative.overview: A polished personal journal for achievements — tactile, warm, proudly individual. The interface combines the focused utility of a productivity tool with the personality of a curated notebook.
keyCharacteristics: Single sans-serif family (Mali) throughout — warm and playful, with handwritten character
Purple accent on a neutral ground; the accent appears on ≤10% of any screen
Flat surfaces with purposeful lift on hover — no resting shadows
Generous rounded corners (14–20px) that feel soft but confident
Phosphor duotone icons for consistent visual vocabulary
Thai-language UI entirely — the language is part of the brand

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The accent appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — when violet appears, it signals interactivity, current state, or a file-type association.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Mali carries every role — heading, body, button, label — with no display/body pairing. The only exception is the monospace data tier for small metadata labels.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface has a shadow at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to hover or active state. The app depth is read through tonal layering and border contrast.

dos: Use violet as the single accent color. Limit it to interactive states, file icons, focus rings, and filter selections.
Use Mali for every text element — headings, body, buttons, labels, navigation. The only exception is monospace data labels (eyebrow text, tags, stats).
Keep surfaces flat. Cards, panels, and containers have no shadow at rest.
Use Phosphor duotone icons throughout. Never mix icon families.
Write all UI text in Thai. The language is part of the brand identity.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion — all animations must have a zero-duration fallback.
Keep form controls consistent: same radius, padding, border, focus treatment everywhere.
donts: Use gradient backgrounds or gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid colors only.
Use blue as an accent. The palette is violet-purple.
Add orchestrated page-load animations or entrance choreography. Motion is for state feedback only.
Use AI-sounding copy — no 'unlock your potential', 'elevate', 'supercharge'. Direct Thai copy only.
Use glassmorphism, numbered section markers (01/02/03), or card-grid-with-icon-heading-body patterns.
Mix radii — 999px for buttons, 12–14px for cards, 8px for inputs. No 32px+ cards.
Place shadows on the same element that has a 1px border decoration. Pick one.
